scripts.copy:wasm: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.join('wasm-core','pkg'); const dest=path.join('webapp','public','wasm'); if (!fs.existsSync(src)) { console.warn('wasm-core/pkg not found. Run: npm run build:wasm'); process.exit(0); } if (!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest, {recursive:true}); const files = fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js')||f.endsWith('.wasm')||f.endsWith('.d.ts')); for (const f of files) fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f), path.join(dest,f)); console.log('Copied', files.length, 'files to webapp/public/wasm');"
scripts.build:wasm:webapp: npm run build:wasm && npm run copy:wasm
scripts.test:all: npm run test:wasm && npm run test:js && npm run test:contracts
